description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex hip roof and multiple dormers. The front facade features a prominent double garage, a main entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding or brick, while the roof is finished with dark shingles. The property includes a patterned driveway and a manicured lawn with geometric grass and pavement designs. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a hip roof, double garage, and a patterned driveway, featuring symmetrical windows and a covered entry porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entry steps, covered porch, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage side wall, entry steps, and a single window, with the patterned lawn visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall with minimal windows and the full expanse of the hip roof.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side elevation, entry steps, and the continuation of the patterned driveway and lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, covered porch, and decorative columns
